rubric_items.reasoning: The agent completed the task correctly at the time of execution: it diagnosed the missing es-transform StatefulSet, deployed transform-capable nodes, force-stopped and restarted the transform via the _stop/_start APIs (respecting the constraint to restore capacity before touching the job), indexed fresh data with a current timestamp to trigger a new checkpoint window, and the stage oracle confirmed success ('Transform recovery verified', exit 0) with the checkpoint advancing from 1 to 2. All stated constraints were followed (no ECK/CRDs, capacity restored first, transform APIs used, destination index not deleted). However, the regression sweep run after the workflow completed shows stage_02 as failed ('Transform stats missing - Destination index has no documents'), indicating the transform state did not persist. 'Transform stats missing' suggests the transform itself may no longer exist in the cluster at regression-sweep time, pointing to a durability gap in the solution. The primary oracle is the authoritative signal (pass), but the regression failure meaningfully reduces confidence that the task objective was sustainably achieved.
